forest_fire.name: Forest Fire
forest_fire.description: Wildfire sweeps through woodland, burning timber stands and fouling the air.

wildfire_smoke.name: Wildfire Smoke
wildfire_smoke.description: Smoke from nearby fires blankets the region, irritating lungs and lowering morale.

drought.name: Drought
drought.description: Rain fails for weeks. Crops wilt and pastures brown under a hard sky.

heatwave.name: Heatwave
heatwave.description: Oppressive heat saps workers and livestock across open country.

flood.name: Flood
flood.description: Rivers burst their banks, drowning fields and fouling low ground.

flash_flood.name: Flash Flood
flash_flood.description: Sudden mountain runoff scours valleys and buries roads in debris.

hurricane.name: Hurricane
hurricane.description: A spinning storm hammers the coast with wind, rain, and surge.

tropical_storm.name: Tropical Storm
tropical_storm.description: A lesser coastal storm lashes harbors and fishing fleets.

tornado.name: Tornado
tornado.description: A narrow funnel tears through farmland and light structures.

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Heavy snow and wind shut mountain passes and freeze quarry work.

hailstorm.name: Hailstorm
hailstorm.description: Ice stones shred standing crops across open plains.

landslide.name: Landslide
landslide.description: A slope gives way, burying roads, timber stands, and mine mouths.

volcanic_ash.name: Volcanic Ash
volcanic_ash.description: Ash falls from a distant eruption, smothering crops and clogging lungs.
